pageContext.name: Rhedosaurus
pageContext.description: The Star Ace Vinyl Model series has begun at last! In celebration of the 100th Anniversary of the master of movie stop motion animation, Ray Harryhausen, Star Ace is proud to release the Rhedosaurus, a vicious ancient creature unleased in the modern day.  Traditionally sculpted by the artisans of the famed creature shop of Kaibutsuya, this detailed Rhedosaurus statue is made from soft vinyl and stands 32cm tall. The Rhedosaurus comes in unpainted and unassembled model kit version of a black and white movie. This model kit will be limited edition on 400 pcs. This is the Allosaurus you've been waiting for!
